title: Cherry Wire
description: This mod modifies the RedStoneWire color by hard-coding it for use with TCTC-Cherry Resource Pack.
body:
# Cherry Wire

English | [中文](https://github.com/The-Cat-Town-Craft/Cherry-Wire/README_ZH_CN.md)

This mod modifies the RedStoneWire color by hard-coding it for use with [TCTC-Cherry](https://github.com/The-Cat-Town-Craft/TCTC-Cherry) Resource Pack.
